The '''Rights of Sentience League''' was an organization affiliated with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].<ref name="cod" /> In [[33 BBY/Legends|32.5 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the organization participated in the [[Eriadu Trade Summit]], an event held on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Eriadu/Legends|Eriadu]] as a forum for the Galactic Republic and the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] to discuss the taxation of outlying trade zones. During the summit, a mixed-[[Species/Legends|species]] group representing the League waited to be admitted at the east entrance of the event's location at [[Seswenna Hall/Legends|Seswenna Hall]] civic center in [[Eriadu City/Legends|Eriadu City]], the planet's [[Capital/Legends|capital]].<ref name="cod" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Rights of Sentience League appeared in the [[2001]] novel ''[[Cloak of Deception]]'', written by [[James Luceno]].<ref name="cod" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Cloak of Deception]]'' {{1st|[[Cloak of Deception (abridged audiobook)|abridged audiobook]]}}
